# Comment on the OMB Rule

> A researcher’s guide to the proposed OMB “Regulation for Federal Financial Assistance” — what it changes, why it threatens science, and how to file a public comment before the deadline.

## Pages

- [The Rule, Section by Section](https://defendfederalresearch.org/the-rule.llms.md)
- [Comment on the OMB Rule](https://defendfederalresearch.org/index.llms.md)
- [FAQ](https://defendfederalresearch.org/faq.llms.md)
- [Contact Congress](https://defendfederalresearch.org/contact-congress.llms.md)
- [About this guide](https://defendfederalresearch.org/about.llms.md)
- [OMB's Claims vs. Reality](https://defendfederalresearch.org/claims-vs-reality.llms.md)
- [Draft a Comment with AI](https://defendfederalresearch.org/draft-with-ai.llms.md)
- [How to Comment](https://defendfederalresearch.org/how-to-comment.llms.md)
- [Resources](https://defendfederalresearch.org/resources.llms.md)
